subcodes.first_line: Ngo tangwe ove Muhona kondjenda yOye kovandu avehe! Ove omwinjo no ndjerera, tiza ovakarere wOye vekare mo ndjira yOye.
subcodes.notes: Theory: BH or AB prayer in Otjiherero -- "Ngo tangwe ove Muhona kondjenda yOye kovandu avehe! Ove omwinjo no ndjerera, tiza ovakarere wOye..." = "O Thou who art Lord and Guide to all people! Thou art the Helper and Protector, make Thy servants firm in Thy path..." General supplication/guidance prayer. From old Otjiherero book. Not found in inventory.
